SIMPLIFIEDVISUALS-COMBAT_EFFECTS.title: Combat Effects
SIMPLIFIEDVISUALS-ENVIRONMENTS.title: Environments
SIMPLIFIEDVISUALS-GAMEPLAY.title: Gameplay
SIMPLIFIEDVISUALS-TIMELINE.title: Timeline/Epochs
SIMPLIFIEDVISUALS-USER_INTERFACE.title: User Interface
SIMPLIFIEDVISUALS-DISABLE_BIG_SLASH_EFFE: Disables the bright flashing Big Slash visual effect, used by [gold]Perfected Strike[/gold], [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] and the [gold]Mecha Knight[/gold].
SIMPLIFIEDVISUALS-DISABLE_PURPLE_DOOM_OV: Disables the purple screen effect when an enemy dies because of [gold]Doom[/gold].
SIMPLIFIEDVISUALS-DISABLE_RADIAL_BLUR_EF: Disable the radial blur/distortion effect used by some enemy attacks ([gold]Bygone Effigy[/gold], [gold]Ceremonial Beast[/gold], [gold]Mecha Knight[/gold], [gold]Shrinker Beetle[/gold], [gold]Vantom[/gold]).
Disable the "scream" effect (concentric circles moving outwards) used by some enemy attacks ([gold]Ceremonial Beast[/gold], [gold]Devoted Sculptor[/gold], [gold]Terror Eel[/gold], [gold]The Insatiable[/gold]).
SIMPLIFIEDVISUALS-DISABLE_SPOOKY_SCREAM_: Disable the similar "spooky scream" effect used by some other enemy attacks ([gold]Haunted Ship[/gold], [gold]Soul Fysh[/gold]).
SIMPLIFIEDVISUALS-DISABLE_REGENT_ATTACK_: Disables the animated swords above the [gold]Regent[/gold] during many attacks (including [gold]Strike[/gold]).
SIMPLIFIEDVISUALS-DISABLE_SOVEREIGN_BLAD: Makes the [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] stay in one place when idle.
SIMPLIFIEDVISUALS-DISABLE_INSATIABLE_SAN: Disables the "sandfalls" in the background of [gold]The Insatiable[/gold].
SIMPLIFIEDVISUALS-DISABLE_OTHER_INSATIAB: Disables the other sand effects (but the sandfalls are left unless disabled above).
SIMPLIFIEDVISUALS-DISABLE_RAIN_EFFECT.ho: Hides the rain effect in the [gold]Slippery Bridge[/gold] event.
SIMPLIFIEDVISUALS-QUICKER_DRAW.title: Quicker draw animation
SIMPLIFIEDVISUALS-QUICKER_DRAW.hover.des: Reduces (essentially removes) the delay between drawing one card and drawing the next, making all cards move together to the hand.
SIMPLIFIEDVISUALS-FREEZE_BACKGROUND_STAR: Disable the movement of the starry background in the Timeline.
SIMPLIFIEDVISUALS-HIDE_CONFETTI.title: Hide confetti behind unlocks
SIMPLIFIEDVISUALS-HIDE_CONFETTI.hover.de: Hides the constant confetti from the unlock screens (for example relics or cards).
SIMPLIFIEDVISUALS-DISABLE_UNLOCK_SHOCKWA: Disable the radiating shockwave animation on the Epoch buttons; also replaces the offscreen animation with an arrow, showing that there are more unlocks available by scrolling left, right or both.
SIMPLIFIEDVISUALS-DISABLE_RARE_CARD_GLOW: Disables the glow and sparkle effect around rare/uncommon cards.
